title: Funny Villager Screaming! (Death Sounds)
body:
Makes killing Minecraft villagers a lot more satisfying and funny by making them scream at death!\
This adds the Wilhelm scream to their death sound, which you can find [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r6JK-gRELI0).

This resource pack has no requirements like [ESF](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf)

As always, I hope you like this pack!
